feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,390Chapters: 65/?Kudos: 33

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,135Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 94

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realises that nothing is quite as it seems...

entry.title: 500 Miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,413Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. A hundred miles from Camelot, he tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back.He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word *traitor*.

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,685Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury. Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own . Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other. There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet. But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it. --------------------------- A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed)Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: Beneath The Same Sky: A Love Is Revealed
entry.summary:
Author: Its_Ivory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,171Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Two young men. Two sides of the same coin. Two destinies intertwined, inseparable from each other, yet they couldn't be more different. Merlin, the personal servant and, coincidentally, arguably the most powerful magician of his time and the one to come. And Arthur, the future king of Camalot and perhaps the only person who has unconsciously made it his life's mission to make Merlin's life a living hell and the worst part is, he does it with a smile. And yet, Arthur is blind to Merlin's magic, for Merlin uses it quite frequently in the young prince's presence. Their paths crossed not too long ago, and since then they've been more or less on the same track. Merlin ensures every day that Arthur's royal backside doesn't meet its demise, while Arthur remains oblivious, believing himself untouchable. So be it... for now.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,977Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 7

Summary: For one hundred years, he carved lines into the earth and runes into his own skin. Now, it is time to crack both open and drag the future back to his King. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing will be brought back from the dead without a cost. He is a king-maker who has outlived his king, a warlock who has finally stopped bartering with words and started bartering with existence. He will pay any price if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again.  A long time-travel, powerful Merlin, twisted Arthur, and what other dreams may come.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: His Majesty My King
entry.summary:
Author: Bollsye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,238Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Arthur’s hand clenched into a fist, his entire body coiled like a drawn blade. Water dripped steadily from his armor, pooling at his feet, but he stood tall despite it every inch a king, the people could feel it in his energy.But his eyesHis eyes betrayed him.Confusion. Disbelief. The dawning realization that nothing before him made sense.The lake behind him was calm.Too calm.As if it had never held him at all.Arthur swallowed hard, his voice lower now, edged with something far more uncertain.“…Merlin?”No one answered.And the crowd only grew. ---------------------------* Or Arthur has finally returned and English is hard

entry.title: When Camelot’s need is greatest
entry.summary:
Author: Makkapakkaahhh

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,757Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 6

Summary: A century after Arthur’s death, Merlin is alone and he believes Albion is finally at peace. He’s wrong. When his magic is stolen to resurrect a powerful enemy, Merlin is left for dead. Will Arthur return when he is needed most? And what will it take to restore the once and future king?

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,797Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Magic’s home
entry.summary:
Author: Damian000

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,428Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Arthur didn’t do anything wrong. It hadn’t been his fault, really! All he was guilty of was having idiotic jocks as friends and being the most mature of them all. If Gwaine and Percy actually had had a bit of grey matter in their heads and could understand the risks of breaking into the school at night, surely Arthur wouldn’t be in this place now.

entry.title: Beast Like Me
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,660Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 26

Summary: The man was beautiful. Hair as gold as dawn sunlight, eyes like the endless blue depths of a midsummer afternoon. His face was a marble angel’s, the lines of brow and cheek and jaw almost too mathematically perfect. Every good sculptor always knew to put in a flaw. His was in his front teeth, just a little too large, and it made Merlin dig his fingernails into his palms. He was lithe, muscular, dressed in black. Half-dressed - his jerkin was unbuttoned, his shirt open nearly to his navel, and he was missing a sock. His hair had the raked-through look of a man in crisis. His smile was dazzling and mad. “This,” he said, spreading his hands, “is the magnificent - nay, the opulent court of the Crown Prince of Camelot!” And then, very pleasantly - “Gaius, what the fuck is this?” OR - When Merlin goes to find Gaius, he's told that he's left Camelot. Tracing his would-be mentor, Merlin finds himself at a tumbledown castle on the edge of a hill. There are chickens, radishes, a knight who'd much rather focus on his squash and a strange voice calling in the night. And a secret hidden in the heart of Castle Perilous. The secret behind the most important rule: don't bleed.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,399Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 174

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

entry.title: For you
entry.summary:
Author: KuroNikushimi

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,426Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Arthur gets kidnapped and is supposed to be sacrificed by midday. Merlin frantically searches for him, but can't find him. He comes upon a group of people who know where Arthur is.. They'll tell him, they say, if Merlin sleeps with each of them. And Merlin would do anything for Arthur. Anything. Had graphic rape but afterwards deal with Merlin's ptsd, Arthur's guilt and very slow recovery

entry.title: hopelessly devoted
entry.summary:
Author: mayonaisie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 370Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: "I am not the one in the wrong here!" Merlin hissed, furiously scrubbing at the floor with the brush like it had something to give him. "You- You have hurt me dozens of times, Arthur!"  "I have hurt you? I haven't been the one lying about my entire identity for years! Did you really take me for a fool this whole time, spinning me around in circles and making a joke of me?"written for @micromerlinfic's april prompts of 'fool' & '"you hurt me"'!

entry.title: Karma Pulled Us to Our Feet Now
entry.summary:
Author: thesongistheriver

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,205Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: When Morgana has a work trip over Mordred's half-term, Arthur gets to play full-time parent instead of part-time uncle. He's definitely not developing a crush on the father of one of Mordred's classmates they run into at the park... ..Merlin enjoys the extra time with his babysitting charges over half-term, so he supposes he can tolerate the arrogant twit whose son invited Tristan to play footie. If only he weren't so gorgeous... ..In which everyone makes assumptions, the kids ship it, and two very smart men are very stupid about each other.

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,000Chapters: 170/?Kudos: 145

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

  • Gwaine/Percival is the main one though
  • mainly because those two are just absolute love!

  • Gwaine does have great hair

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,339Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 59

Summary: “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” With closed eyes, Merlin reached upward and imagined Arthur’s warm hand wrapping around his own. There was a sick irony in hearing this now, in these final moments. “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” For Merlin was alone. He died alone. ـــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: It's sweet like saccharine
entry.summary:
Author: sug4rd0v3

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Camelot is intense the closer she gets. The castle looms, ancient- Imposing. Merilyn's heart pounds beneath the tattered bodice of the dress her mother had agonized over. To ensure she left a good impression on her uncle Gaius. Merilyn knows deep down as her feet hit worn cobblestone, she is home. Her magic curls lovingly through her veins, something ancient in her aware as acutely as possible today would be the beginning of something extraordinary.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
